title: An Act to Expand the Hunter Safety Course Exemption for Certain Individuals with Firearm Training
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 24, 2025
last_house_action: 4/1/2025 - Committee on Inland Fisheries and Wildlife suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/24/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
